en: Yes. Okay, it's a tradition on the Big Fat Quiz of the Year for the children of Mitchell Brook Primary School in Neasden
to produce one of their unusual school plays for us.
What I want you to do is have a look at this, tell me what they're re-enacting.
I don't like you anymore. Good, give me all your money then.
I told you she was horrible, Daddy! Hold up.
Why do you need the money for? Helicopters and horses and, oh yeah, charity.
You're silly, I only have money for you.
That was amazing. Amazing. That was pretty good, wasn't it?
